rules.description: Renewal plan (Removed for FY26) achievement band at 100%-125% attainment earns 1.25x multiplier on Quarterly Growth ARR component

rawSnapshot.evidence: 0% - 100% multiplier 1 | >100% and <=125% multiplier 1.25 | >125% and <=150% multiplier 1.25

rules.description: D2D Partner plan eligibility requires: opportunity must have install date in payment period, partner must be Active, products must have rate effective on install date, and partner must be assigned to a compensation plan

conditions: Opportunity must have an install date in the payment period
Partner must be Active at time opportunity is closed (Agent status is not relevant)
Opportunity must be installed within the period being calculated for payout
Products must be assigned a rate effective on the install date
Partner must be assigned to a compensation plan at the time of credit eligibility

rawSnapshot.evidence: To be eligible for credit and payment on a closed opportunity, the following conditions must be met: Opportunity Status: The opportunity must have and install Date in the payment period date; Partner Status: The Partner must be Active...

rules.description: Outbound plan eligibility for Deal Reg component requires territory assignment match, closed-won in period, NRD exclusion, exclude-from-compensation check, Partner Registration with approved status, and reseller name interchangeability rules

conditions: Opp is assigned to same territory as rep
Opp is closed won in period
Opp close date >= plan effective date and <= plan end date
Rep must not be on NRD on the close date
Exclude opportunities with 'Exclude from Compensation' Boolean = true
Opp has related Partner Registration__c object
Partner Registration Record Type = Deal Registration
Partner Registration Record Status = Approve
DR TYPE check on related PartnerRegistration__c

rawSnapshot.evidence: This is for the Deal Reg component: a. Opp is assigned to same territory as rep, b. Opp is closed won in period...

rules.description: Renewal plan (Removed FY26) eligibility requires closed-won status, active employee, territory assignment, plan enrollment, NRD exclusion, New Logo = False, and Related_Return__c blank

conditions: Opportunity must be in Closed - Won status
Employee must be Active at time of close
Opportunity must be closed within the period
Payee must be assigned to the territory associated with the opportunity
Payee must be assigned to a compensation plan
Rep must not be on NRD on the close date
Exclude opportunities with 'Exclude from Compensation' Boolean = true
Rep ID must be in Owner at Close field
Opp types: Amendments, Renewals, Transaction (closed won) or Renewals (closed lost)
New Logo = False
Related_Return__c = blank

rawSnapshot.evidence: To be eligible for plan credit and payment on a closed opportunity... Employee Status: Active... New Logo = False (checkbox on Opp), Related_Return__c = blank

rules.description: Base Commission Rate (BCR) formula for Employee plans: BCR = Target Variable Pay in USD × GARR Weighting ÷ Annual GARR Quota

parameters.formula: BCR = Target Variable Pay (USD) × GARR Weighting ÷ Annual GARR Quota

rawSnapshot.evidence: BCR: Base Commission Rate (BCR) is calculated in accordance with the Policy: BCR = Target Variable Pay in USD × GARR Weighting ÷ Annual GARR Quota

rules.description: Outbound plan attainment is calculated as ARR divided by Quota

rawSnapshot.evidence: ARR / Quota = Attainment; Attainment * Weighted Variable = Payout

rules.description: EDU Kicker provides additional commission for EDU-flagged opportunities. Operates as mutually exclusive with standard kickers: Services Kicker OR Services Kicker EDU (not both), New Logo Kicker OR New Logo Kicker EDU (not both), Multi Year Kicker OR Multi Year Kicker EDU (not both). Only Opp Owner receives EDU Kicker for Customer Success and QBR plans.

parameters.eligibilityFilter: Opp Owner ID where EDU Kicker field = True on Global Attributes

rawSnapshot.evidence: EDU kicker: Services Kicker OR Services Kicker EDU - but not both; New Logo Kicker OR New Logo Kicker EDU - but not both; Multi Year Kicker OR Multi Year Kicker EDU - but not both

parameters.note: Pacing Kicker is not subject for True-ups

rawSnapshot.evidence: Pacing Kicker is not subject for Tureups

rules.description: SDR Mentors receive a flat rate commission with multiplier hard-coded at 1 (no acceleration). Rate is calculated based on plan tiers.

rules.description: Variable data change effective dating rule: changes on or before the 12th of the month are backdated to the 1st; changes on or after the 13th are effective from the 1st of the following month. If only non-structural variable changes, prorate by business day.

parameters.variableOnlyChange: Prorate by business day: (old variable / biz days in month * biz days on old) + (new variable / biz days in month * biz days on new)

rawSnapshot.evidence: If a variable changes on or before the 12th of the month, the change will be backdated to the 1st of the month. If the change occurs on or after the 13th, it will be effective from the 1st of the following month. If ONLY variable changes then we prorate the change by business day.

rules.description: D2D rate lookup is determined by matching Install Date to period, Technology (e.g., Fibre), Channel (D2D), Product Name (e.g., Fiber 1 GB), and Order Type (e.g., Migration)

rawSnapshot.evidence: if Install Date(Feb 1) is between Feb 1 and Feb 8 and Technology is Fibre and Channel is D2D and Product Name is Fiber 1 GB and ORDER Type is Migration : look up rate

rules.description: D2D Partner plan true-up: continues until plan assignment changes or fiscal year ends. Previous quarter true-up no longer exists; only current quarter true-up exists.

parameters.note: Previous quarter true-up will no longer exist

rawSnapshot.evidence: True Up: until the plan assignment changes or the Fiscal year. True Up: previous quarter true will no longer exist. Only the current quarter true up exists

rules.description: Manual upload rep attainment adjustments for Partner plans require: Vendor ID mapping, adjustment date in period, date within plan period bounds, and vendor must be active on adjustment date

conditions: Adjustment has Vendor ID in upload to map to Plan
Adjustment date is in period
Adjustment date >= plan period effective date and <= plan period end date
Vendor must be active on the adjustment date

rawSnapshot.evidence: Manual Upload Rep Attainment Adjustments must follow this criteria: a. Adjustment has Vendor ID in upload to map to Plan, b. Adjustment date is in period...

rules.description: Manual upload rep attainment adjustments for Employee/Outbound plans require: rep ID mapping, adjustment date in period, date within plan bounds, and rep must not be on NRD on adjustment date

conditions: Adjustment has rep ID in upload to map to rep
Adjustment date is in period
Adjustment date >= plan effective date and <= plan end date
Rep must not be on NRD on the adjustment date

rawSnapshot.evidence: Manual Upload Rep Attainment Adjustments must follow this criteria: a. Adjustment has rep ID in upload to map to rep in Spiff, b. Adjustment date is in period, c. Adjustment date must be >= plan effective date...

rules.description: Outbound plan territory-based attainment adjustments require territory mapping, territory assignment match, date in period, rep not on NRD

adjustmentConditions: Adjustment has territory in upload to map to territory assignment
Territory Adjustment is for the territory the rep is assigned to
Adjustment date >= plan effective date and <= plan end date
Rep must not be on NRD on the adjustment date

rawSnapshot.evidence: Manual Upload Territory Attainment Adjustments must follow this criteria: a. Adjustment has territory in upload to map to territory assignment...

rules.description: D2D Partner payout formula: Sum of commission payout + payment adjustments + NRD payments + any previous period commission owed

parameters.payoutFormula: Sum commission payout + payment adjustments + NRD payments + any previous period commission owe

rawSnapshot.evidence: Payout = Sum commission payout + payment adjustments + NRD payments + any previous period commission owe

rawSnapshot.evidence: Flat Rate; Based on Territory Assignment

rawSnapshot.evidence: Growth - Renewal | Quarterly Growth ARR | 0.3 | Annual | Monthly

insights: 1) CRITICAL GAP: Exact rate tables by internet speed/product are NOT included in this BRD - they are referenced as external documents (see Questions row 4 linking to a SharePoint rate table workbook). The rate ranges shown ($350-$625 etc.) represent min/max bounds but individual speed-tier rates must be cross-referenced from the external rate card. 2) The Renewal plan (Plan ID 2) is explicitly marked 'Removed for FY26' but its structure is documented - confirm whether to exclude from implementation. 3) Employee plan details (MDU, D2D Employee, Management plans) are listed in the Checklist but lack detailed functional requirements in the Functional Requirements sheet - these appear incomplete. 4) Pacing Kicker is mentioned as having a discrepancy between the Planned Doc and CIQ setup for the Indirect plan. 5) The Outbound 'penalty for below quota' decelerator lacks specific rate/multiplier values. 6) Recoverable Draw is mentioned but no terms (amount, recovery period, recovery method) are specified. 7) Historical data question (#9 in Questions sheet) about 90-day chargeback lookback period is flagged as not yet sent. 8) D2D crediting basis changed from 'Installed' to 'Issued' effective 9/7 per Questions row 12. 9) SDR rollup crediting and manager commission logic needs cross-referencing with actual plan documents. 10) Currency conversion uses 'Constant Currency' exchange rate set at beginning of year from Snowflake data workbook - affects all non-USD payouts.
